articles.description: Circle and GitHub have both complied with recent U.S. sanctions against the Ethereum coin mixer Tornado Cash. It also sanctioned the project's website at tornado.cash.Now, two companies have complied. articles.title: US Government Prohibits American Citizens from Interacting with Tornado Cash
articles.description: TLDR: The U.S. sanctioned Tornado Cash, the mixing token that makes Ethereum transactions untraceable.
